description_long: This is a medium-sized, polygonal wooden barrel with a slightly tapered cylindrical shape and flat top and bottom surfaces. The body is constructed from dark brown wooden staves, each with visible wood grain texture, giving it a rustic and weathered appearance. Two thick, black metallic bands encircle the barrel horizontally, one near the top and one near the bottom, serving as structural reinforcement. The surface of the metal bands shows signs of wear and aging, with patches of lighter gray indicating scuffing or corrosion. The top and bottom faces are closed, with no visible openings, handles, or spouts. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for storage or decorative use in urban environments such as alleys, courtyards, or garages.
description: A dark brown wooden barrel with two black metal bands and a weathered, rustic appearance. The top and bottom are flat and closed, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the polygonal wooden staves and both black metal bands clearly, with the top face fully visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the angular facets of the barrel and the texture of the wood and metal bands.
description_view_2: Side view with the barrel's symmetry and the even spacing of the metal bands most apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing consistent wear on the metal bands and the uninterrupted wood grain.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops, top and bottom
